name: bdwelle--mac-contacts
description: CLI for reading and managing macOS Contacts (CNContactStore). Supports searching by name, email, phone number, city, or country; showing all fields for a contact including list membership; creating and updating contacts with name, org, phone, email, and postal address; deleting contacts; and managing group (list) membership. Use when asked to look up, add, edit, remove, or organise contacts on macOS, or when you need a contact's phone number, email, address, or which lists they belong to.
